expectations.text: Adds role='combobox' to the input or wrapping element
Includes aria-expanded to reflect open/closed state
Includes aria-controls pointing to the listbox
Adds role='listbox' to the results list
Adds role='option' to each result item
Mentions aria-activedescendant for tracking highlighted option
expectations.evidence: aria-activedescendant mentioned and implemented; includes mousedown vs click nuance

expectations.text: Covers keyboard pattern: arrows to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close

expectations.evidence: Noted as likely missing and included in fix
